### 📝 Summary of Changes

### ⚙️ Architectural Compliance
- [ ] Database schema migrations or queries align with **Dexie.js IndexedDB** local-first architecture.
- [ ] PWA asset lists and manifest descriptors are properly registered.
- [ ] Offline caching rules (`vite-plugin-pwa`) remain intact.
- [ ] No external trackers or network call telemetry are added (ensuring strict medical privacy).

### 🎨 UI/UX Design Verification (If Applicable)
- [ ] Refined design matches the **Deep Dark Mode** contrast rules.
- [ ] Tested and verified human silhouette vector positioning.
- [ ] Layout is fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports.
- [ ] Micro-interactions and icons are pixel-perfect.

### 🧪 Quality Assurance & Verification
- [ ] Local build compiles cleanly (`npm run build`).
- [ ] Database migrations and transaction checks function cleanly in dev tools.
- [ ] PWA install registers cleanly in test sandbox.
